metodos.codigoOriginal:
If ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 1
	Report Form SigReIf1 Preview NoConsole
Else
	If ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 2
		Report Form SigReIf0 Preview NoConsole
	Else
		Report Form SigReIf9 Preview NoConsole
	EndIf
EndIf

ldBase  = Right(ThisForm.Get_DtBase.Value,4)  + Left(ThisForm.Get_DtBase.Value,2)
ldBaseA = Right(ThisForm.Get_DtBaseA.Value,4) + Left(ThisForm.Get_DtBaseA.Value,2)
lnTipo  = ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value
lcEmp   = ThisForm.Get_Empresa.Value
lcMoe   = ThisForm.Get_Cd_Moeda.Value
lcGrupo = ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
lcConta = ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Value
lnBarra = ThisForm.GetIBarra.Value

******************************************************************************************
=Seek(_Empr,'CrS... [TRUNCADO]
=fConfigGeral()

LParameters _Acesso

ThisForm.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector',ThisForm.Name)
If ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdconn < 1
	MessageBox('Impossivel Efetuar Conexăo com Servidor de Banco de Dados.',(0+48),goSistema.TituloSistema)
	Return(.F.)
EndIf

=DoDefault(_Acesso)

If ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute([Select * From SigCdEmp ],'CrSigCdEmp') < 1
	MessageBox('Favor reinicializar o processo !!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (CrSigCdEmp)')
	Return(.F.)
EndIf
Select CrSigCdEmp
Index On CEmps Tag CEmps
Go Top

... [TRUNCADO]

If ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 1
	Report Form SigReIf1 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
Else
	If ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 2
		Report Form SigReIf0 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	Else
		Report Form SigReIf9 To Printer Prompt NoConsole
	EndIf
EndIf

If This.Value <> 4
	If Empty(ThisForm.Get_DtBase.Value)
		MessageBox('Data Base Inválida !!!',16,'Campo Obrigatório')
		ThisForm.Get_DtBase.SetFocus
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf
	If Empty(ThisForm.Get_Cd_Moeda.Value) And InList(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value,1,2)
		MessageBox('Moeda Inválida !!!',16,'')
		ThisForm.Get_Cd_Moeda.SetFocus
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf

	Do Case

		Case ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 1
			If Empty(ThisForm.Get_Empresa.Value) And ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 1
				MessageBox('Empresa Inválida !!... [TRUNCADO]

If This.Value = 2
	ThisForm.GrdEmp.Visible       = .T.
	ThisForm.CmdApgEmp.Visible    = .T.
	ThisForm.CmdSelEmp.Visible    = .T.
	ThisForm.Say3.Visible         = .F.
	ThisForm.Get_Empresa.Visible  = .F.
	ThisForm.Get_Dempresa.Visible = .F.
*!*		ThisForm.btnReport.Top   = 342
*!*		ThisForm.Height               = 400
	ThisForm.Refresh
Else
	ThisForm.GrdEmp.Visible       = .F.
	ThisForm.CmdApgEmp.Visible    = .F.
	ThisForm.CmdSelEmp.Visible    = .F.
	ThisForm.Say3.Visible         = .T.
	ThisForm.Ge... [TRUNCADO]
Return(InList(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value,1,3))
Return(fAcessoEmpresa(Usuar,'C',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Empresa,ThisForm.Get_DEmpresa))

If !Empty(This.Value)
	If Seek(This.Value,'CsBases','Bases')
		This.Value = Evaluate('CsBases.Bases')
	Else	
		m.loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaInt','CsBases','Bases',This.Value,'Data Base',.T.)
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('Bases','XXXXXXXXXX','Data Base')
		m.loLista.Show()
		If LastKey() <> 27
			This.Value = Evaluate('CsBases.Bases')
		Else
			This.Value = ''
		EndIf
	EndIf
EndIf
This.Refresh
Return(.T.)
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Cd_Moeda.Value) And InList(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value,1,2))

If !Empty(This.Value)
	m.loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt',ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn,'SigCdMoe','CrMoedas','DMoes',This.Value,'Moedas',.T.)
	If !(m.loLista.plAchouRegistro)
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes','','Descriçăo')
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes','XXXXXX','Código')
		m.loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	If LastKey() <> 27 And Used('CrMoedas')
		This.Value                  = Evaluate('CrMoedas.DMoes')
		ThisForm.Get_Cd_Moeda.Value = Evaluate('CrMoedas.CMoes')
	Else
		This.Value                  = ''
... [TRUNCADO]
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Empresa.Value))
Return(fAcessoEmpresa(Usuar,'D',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Empresa,ThisForm.Get_DEmpresa))
Return(InList(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value,1,2))

If !Empty(This.Value)
	m.loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaExt',ThisForm.poDataMgr.pnIdConn,'SigCdMoe','CrMoedas','CMoes',This.Value,'Moedas',.T.)
	If !(m.loLista.plAchouRegistro)
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('CMoes','XXXXXX','Código')
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('DMoes','','Descriçăo')
		m.loLista.Show()
	EndIf
	If LastKey() <> 27 And Used('CrMoedas')
		This.Value                  = Evaluate('CrMoedas.CMoes')
		ThisForm.Get_Ds_Moeda.Value = Evaluate('CrMoedas.DMoes')
	Else
		This.Value                  = ''
... [TRUNCADO]
Return(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 2)

If !Empty(This.Value)
	If Seek(This.Value,'CsBases','Bases')
		This.Value = Evaluate('CsBases.Bases')
	Else	
		m.loLista = CreateObject('fwBuscaInt','CsBases','Bases',This.Value,'Data Base',.T.)
		m.loLista.mAddColuna('Bases','XXXXXXXXXX','Data Base')
		m.loLista.Show()
		If LastKey() <> 27
			This.Value = Evaluate('CsBases.Bases')
		Else
			This.Value = ''
		EndIf
	EndIf
EndIf
This.Refresh
Return(.T.)
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value))

llRet = .T.
If !Empty(This.Value)
	llRet = fAcessoContab(Usuar,'D',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque,ThisForm.Get_Ds_GrEstoque)
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Refresh
EndIf
Return(llRet)

llRet = .T.
If !Empty(This.Value)
	llRet = fAcessoContab(Usuar,'C',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque,ThisForm.Get_Ds_GrEstoque)
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Refresh
EndIf
Return(llRet)
Return(Empty(ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Value))

Grupo = ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
If !Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'D',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque,ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque)
		MessageBox('Acesso Negado !!!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Refresh
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque.Refresh
EndIf
Return(.T.)

Grupo = ThisForm.Get_Cd_GrEstoque.Value
If !Empty(This.Value)
	If !fAcessoContas(Usuar,Grupo,'C',This.Value,ThisForm.Get_Cd_Estoque,ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque)
		MessageBox('Acesso Negado !!!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = ''
		This.Refresh
		ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque.Value = ''
		ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque.Refresh
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf
Else
	ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque.Value = ''
	ThisForm.Get_Ds_Estoque.Refresh
EndIf
Return(.T.)
Return(ThisForm.OptGTpRel.Value = 3)

lnProd = This.Value

If !Empty(lnProd)
	If Used('TmpEti')
		Use In TmpEti
	EndIf
	lStrQuery = [Select CBars From SigOpEtq Where CBars = ]+Alltrim(Str(lnProd,8))+[ ]
	If ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lStrQuery,'TmpEti') < 1
		MessageBox('Favor reinicializar o processo !!!', 16, 'Falha na Conexăo (TmpEti)')
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf
	Select TmpEti
	Go Top
	If Eof()
		MessageBox('Etiqueta năo Encontrada !!!',0+48,'')
		This.Value = 0
		Return(.F.)
	EndIf
EndIf
Return(.T.)
Return(.F.)
Return(.F.)

Select CsSigCdEmp
Update CsSigCdEmp Set lMarca = 0
Go Top
ThisForm.GrdEmp.Refresh

Select CsSigCdEmp
Update CsSigCdEmp Set lMarca = 1
Go Top
ThisForm.GrdEmp.Refresh

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: lStrQuery = [Select CBars From SigOpEtq Where CBars = ]+Alltrim(Str(lnProd,8))+[ ] 	If ThisForm.poDataMgr.SqlExecute(lStrQuery,'TmpEti') < 1
